lesson.menu_title: Meeting Clients for the First Time
lesson.subtitle: Aula 7 -- Meeting Clients for the First Time -- Welcoming a Client
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Rafael de Andrade Brandão | Aula 7 -- Meeting Clients for the First Time

listenings.text: Good morning, and welcome to TVT. My name is Laura, and I work at the reception. You must be here for the ten o'clock appointment with Mr. Brandao. He is available now and is very happy to meet you. Please take a seat for a moment, and make yourself comfortable. Would you like a refreshment? We have coffee, tea, and water. Here is a brochure about our company while you wait. Mr. Brandao will come to the reception in two minutes, and then he will take you to the meeting room. The agenda for today is on the table. Thank you, and enjoy your visit.

Hi, this is Rafael. I am calling to tell you about our new client visit this morning. Diana came to the office for her first meeting, and it went very well. I welcomed her at the reception, and I offered her a coffee. I gave her a brochure about our products, and we talked about the agenda. She was very friendly and asked many good questions. I think she is a strong new client for us. We agreed to meet again next week. I will send her a welcome message and a short summary by email today. I will tell you more in our meeting tomorrow. Talk to you soon.

extra_audio.text: Diana arrives at TVT and reports to the reception. Laura welcomes her and offers a refreshment. Rafael comes to the reception and greets the client. He takes her coat and shows her a brochure. Then they go to the meeting room and look at the agenda together.
